DP.087.0000:
Eh? Did you want something?\f
How silly of me to even ask.
You want to free the Pokémon.\r
Yeah, that’s gonna happen!\f
DP.087.0001:
Well, aren’t you tough...?\f
It’s OK, though. Our official Pokémon-
statue investigation is finished.\f
Mars has collected energy from
the Valley Windworks.\f
We’re pretty much finished here.
I’ll let you in on one little thing.\f
Our boss is researching the myths
of ancient Pokémon.\f
With the power of mythical Pokémon,
he will become the ruler of Sinnoh...\f
I suggest you keep out of Team
Galactic’s affairs from now on.\f
This is your last warning!\f
DP.087.0003:
What is it with this Team Galactic?\f
Why did they take our Pokémon?
What are they trying to accomplish?
DP.087.0004:
I got my CLEFAIRY back, and it’s all
thanks to you!\f
But that Team Galactic...\f
They said, “Clefairy came from
space. Hand it over!”\f
Their logic baffles me still.
It’s like they are from space!\f
Anyway, they’re gone now.
Thank you very much!\f
I can’t thank you enough right now,
but cruise by my Cycle Shop, OK?\f
